tagline: Any product turnkey. From idea to launch.

studio.title: HΞPTRΛI Studio
studio.subtitle: Solo Product Studio — from idea to launch

arman.title: Arman
arman.subtitle: Personal AI agent in your Telegram
arman.lead: Built for myself. Receives errands by text or voice, executes them across web, WhatsApp and search, reports back as a real assistant would.

receive.title: Receive
receive.text: Tasks come in via Telegram chat — text or voice. Voice is transcribed by Whisper, intent is parsed by Claude.

execute.title: Execute
execute.text: Searches the web, drafts WhatsApp messages to real contacts, books appointments, compiles research. Tool-use on Claude Sonnet 4.6.

report.title: Report
report.text: Sends back results in Telegram — links, tables, confirmations. Asks follow-up questions when needed.

arman.stack: Python · FastAPI · Claude Sonnet 4.6 · python-telegram-bot · Waha (WhatsApp HTTP) · Whisper · Tavily · SQLite · Docker Compose

dialog.user1: Compare three payment methods for Shopify in Brazil and give a recommendation
dialog.agent1: Compared Stripe Brazil, Mercado Pago and Stone:
dialog.agent2:
Stripe — global brand, 3.99% + R$0.39, no local PIX.
Mercado Pago — local, 2.99% + PIX free, easier KYB.
Stone — flat 1.99% but only for established LTDA.
dialog.agent3: Recommendation: Mercado Pago for small-medium volume — PIX out of the box, lower fees on local cards, faster onboarding.

arman.noteText: Arman runs locally on my machine and processes only my account. The interesting part isn't the bot — it's the assembly: agent loop, tool-use orchestration, voice in, multi-channel out. If you need one tailored to your workflow, I build them on order.

damir.title: Damir
damir.subtitle: QOSVANTA's payment solutions consultant
damir.scopeText: Damir works only on qosvanta.vercel.app. He answers questions about payment providers, fees, jurisdictions, and routes qualified merchants to a human manager on Telegram.

advise.title: Advises
advise.text: Compares 200+ verified providers — fiat, crypto, local rails — by country, fee, KYB, risk segment. Plain-English answers, no jargon dump.

qualify.title: Qualifies
qualify.text: Asks the merchant about volume, country, methods, risk profile — turns vague intent into a concrete brief in 3-5 messages.

route.title: Routes
route.text: Hands off the qualified lead to the right human manager on Telegram with full context. No "talk to sales" dead-ends.

damir.stack: Claude Sonnet 4.6 · Next.js 16 · Supabase · Tool-use · Telegram routing

dialog.user1: iGaming startup, Brazil, ~$200k/mo volume. Need PIX + cards, low fees, fast onboarding.
dialog.agent1: Good — that's a fit-able profile. Three matches:
dialog.agent2:
• AtlasPay LATAM — PIX + cards, 2.5%, fast KYB
• Mercado Pago — 2.99% + free PIX, easier onboarding
• Stone — 1.99% flat, but only for established LTDA
dialog.agent3: For your stage I'd start with AtlasPay LATAM. Want me to forward your details to their manager?

damir.noteText: Damir is part of QOSVANTA's product — not a stand-alone service. To actually talk to him, open QOSVANTA and click the gold chat button in the bottom-right corner.
